header.title: Local consumption of electricity and gas by type of users and sales revenue from locally sold
tablenote: 1 terajoule = 1012joules.  Figures in the table may not add up to the total due to rounding.
Excluding industry own use and losses, i.e. consumption of energy by power companies and energy losses in electricity transformation and distribution, and exports of electricity to Chinese Mainland.
header.source: CLP Power Hong Kong Limited, The Hongkong Electric Company, Limited and The Hong Kong and China Gas Company Limited
